roi_calculation: Immediate. Automates 90% of Authentication Service testing (TEST-001, TEST-002). Saves approx. 8 hours of manual testing per release cycle. Breakeven: < 2 months.
infrastructure_setup: Configure CI pipeline for Jest/Supertest; Set up local AWS Cognito mocks.
success_metrics: 100% pass rate on Auth Service Unit/Integration tests; < 5 min feedback loop on PRs.
risk_factors: Dependency on AWS Cognito availability for integration tests.
mitigation_strategies: Implement robust mocking for AWS Cognito using aws-sdk-client-mock for CI stability.
business_value: Ensures zero unauthorized access regressions; Validates RBAC enforcement (SOC2 requirement).

roi_calculation: Very High. Covers Financial Service (TEST-011) and Stripe Integration (TEST-012, TEST-013). Prevents financial loss errors ($$$). Manual testing is complex/risky; automation reduces cycle time by 70%.
infrastructure_setup: Containerized Stripe CLI in CI; Redis instance for idempotency testing.
success_metrics: 100% Webhook signature verification coverage; Zero double-payment regressions.
risk_factors: Stripe API version changes breaking webhook contracts.
mitigation_strategies: Use contract testing (Pact) or strict API version pinning in Stripe client.
business_value: Guarantees financial ledger accuracy; Prevents fraud and double-spending scenarios.

roi_calculation: High. Covers User Management (TEST-005) and Frontend Auth UI (TEST-016). Replaces repetitive manual regression of login/dashboard flows. ROI realized within 3 releases.
infrastructure_setup: Headless browser environment in CI; Parallel execution configuration.
success_metrics: Full regression suite executes in < 20 mins; Cross-browser compatibility verified.
risk_factors: Flaky tests due to async UI updates or network latency.
mitigation_strategies: Implement auto-retries in Playwright; Use data-test-id attributes in React components.
business_value: Validates the actual user experience; Ensures critical flows (Login -> Dashboard) work across browsers.

roi_calculation: Medium/High. Automates AI Ingestion Worker (TEST-007, TEST-008) and Vector Matching (TEST-009). Manual testing of AI accuracy is extremely slow. Automation enables rapid prompt engineering iteration.
infrastructure_setup: Dedicated GPU/Neural instances not required (API based), but massive SOW test dataset needed.
success_metrics: AI Extraction Accuracy > 85%; Search latency < 300ms p95.
risk_factors: Non-deterministic LLM outputs causing flaky assertions.
mitigation_strategies: Use 'Fuzzy' matching assertions; Validate JSON schema structure rather than exact text matches.
business_value: Validates the core USP (AI Matching); Ensures system scales to 1000 concurrent users.

roi_calculation: Long-term. Automated security scans (TEST-002, TEST-004, TEST-022) prevent costly breaches. Infrastructure testing (TEST-019) prevents downtime. ROI is measured in 'risk avoidance'.
infrastructure_setup: Integration of DAST/SAST tools into CI pipeline steps.
success_metrics: Zero Critical/High vulnerabilities in release candidates; 100% IaC compliance.
mitigation_strategies: Tune security rule sets; Implement 'warn-only' mode for non-critical findings initially.
business_value: Continuous compliance posture (GDPR/SOC2); Automated infrastructure validation.
